# Release Checklist
<!-- Generated by handover v1.2.1 -->

## Pre-release checklist

- [ ] All tests pass with zero failures
- [ ] Coverage meets per-package thresholds defined in testing standards
- [ ] Benchmark harness runs cleanly and results are committed to `docs/benchmarks/`
- [ ] All 4 sample repos index and produce packs without errors
- [ ] All 3 agent adapters produce correct output files on the sample repos
- [ ] MCP server starts and all 8 tools respond to test calls
- [ ] Multi-repo workspace flow tested with the 3-repo sample
- [ ] `.context-routerignore` defaults reviewed and correct
- [ ] Secret masker tested against sample inputs with known secret patterns
- [ ] No hardcoded paths, API keys, or internal URLs in any committed file
- [ ] `pip-audit` clean on all dependencies
- [ ] `architecture.md` and `roadmap.md` reflect current state
- [ ] All ADRs up to date
- [ ] CHANGELOG entry written for this version
- [ ] `--version` flag returns correct semver
- [ ] `scripts/smoke-v3.sh report` exits 0 (every outcome in `docs/release/v3-outcomes.yaml` passes)
- [ ] Per-phase re-reviews under `internal_docs/ship-check/per-phase-reviews/` contain no unresolved P0/P1 findings
- [ ] Ship-check verdict pasted in each feature PR body (see `CLAUDE.md` → "Feature quality gate")

## Versioning

- Use semver: MAJOR.MINOR.PATCH
- v0.x.0 releases are used for all pre-GA milestones
- v1.0.0 is reserved for when all 8 milestones are complete and benchmark numbers are published
- Tag format: `v0.1.0`, `v0.2.0`, etc.

## Release artifacts

- PyPI package published for `context-router` CLI
- GitHub release with CHANGELOG excerpt and benchmark summary
- `docs/benchmarks/` updated with latest JSON reports and README table
- Sample repos tagged at the same release SHA

## Post-release

- Verify `pip install context-router` works cleanly in a fresh virtual environment
- Verify `context-router --help` and `context-router mcp` work after install
- Verify Claude Code MCP setup docs work end-to-end
- Open milestone for next phase
